title: Message content modification devices and methods
abstract: The example embodiments are directed to an application and a system capable of withholding message content included within an electronic message that is intended for a message recipient. In one example, the method includes at least one of: receiving an electronic message from a user device, the electronic message including content and at least one message recipient, withholding a portion of the content of the electronic message for a message recipient based on a subject matter of the content portion and transmitting a remaining content portion of the electronic message to the message recipient, receiving information about a subsequent activity of the message recipient from a message recipient device, and transmitting withheld content to the message recipient based on the received information about the subsequent activity of the message recipient.
claims: Claims THE CLAIMS: 1. A method comprising: receiving an electronic message from a user device, the electronic message comprising content and at least one message recipient; withholding a portion of the content of the electronic message for a message recipient based on a subject matter of the content portion and transmitting a remaining content portion of the electronic message to the message recipient; receiving information about a subsequent activity of the message recipient from a message recipient device; and transmitting withheld content to the message recipient based on the received information about the subsequent activity of the message recipient. 2. The method of claim 1, wherein the subsequent activity information comprises data viewed via a web browsing client of the message recipient device. 3. The method of claim 1, wherein the subsequent activity information comprises data from a communication session between the message recipient device and another user device via at least one of an email client, a messaging client, and a voice service. 4. The method of claim 1, wherein the receiving comprises receiving a message comprising textual data associated with the message recipient that is extracted from at least one of content viewed via a web browser of the message recipient device and a communication session between the message recipient device and another user device. 5. The method of claim 4, wherein the method further comprises identifying at least one keyword included within the textual data associated with the message recipient and comparing the identified at least one keyword to one or more keywords included within the withheld content, and the transmitting comprises transmitting a portion of the withheld content that has a keyword that matches a keyword included within the textual data associated with the message recipient. 6. The method of claim 1, wherein the withholding comprises parsing textual content included within a body of the electronic message, splitting the parsed content into content associated with secure subject matter and content associated with non-secure subject matter, and withholding the split textual content associated with secure subject matter. 7. The method of claim 6, wherein the withholding further comprises replacing the split textual content associated with secure subject matter with more generic textual content. 8. The method of claim 1, wherein the withholding comprises withholding at least one paragraph included in a body of the electronic message based on a subject matter extracted from textual content of the at least one paragraph. 9. The method of claim 1, wherein the withholding comprises withholding at least one attached computer file that is attached to the electronic message based on a subject matter extracted from textual content included in the attached computer file. 10. A computing system comprising: a network interface configured to receive an electronic message from a user device, the electronic message comprising content and at least one message recipient; and a processor configured to withhold a portion of the content of the electronic message for a message recipient based on a subject matter of the content portion, and control the network interface to transmit a remaining content portion of the electronic message to the message recipient, wherein the processor is further configured to receive information about a subsequent activity of the message recipient from a message recipient device, and control the network interface to transmit withheld content to the message recipient based on the received information about the subsequent activity of the message recipient. 11. The computing system of claim 10, wherein the subsequent activity information comprises data viewed via a web browsing client of the message recipient device. 12. The computing system of claim 10, wherein the subsequent activity information comprises data from a communication session between the message recipient device and another user device via at least one of an email client, a messaging client, and a voice service. 13. The computing system of claim 10, wherein the processor is configured to receive a message comprising textual data associated with the message recipient that is extracted from at least one of content viewed via a web browser of the message recipient device and a communication session between the message recipient device and another user device. 14. The computing system of claim 13, wherein the processor is further configured to identify at least one keyword included within the textual data associated with the message recipient, compare the identified at least one keyword to one or more keywords included within the withheld content, and control the network interface to transmit a portion of the withheld content that has a keyword that matches a keyword included within the textual data associated with the message recipient. 15. The computing system of claim 10, wherein the processor is configured to parse textual content included within a body of the electronic message, split the parsed content into content associated with secure subject matter and content associated with nonsecure subject matter, and withhold the split textual content associated with secure subject matter. 16. The computing system of claim 15, wherein the processor is further configured to replace the split textual content associated with secure subject matter with more generic textual content. 17. The computing system of claim 10, wherein the processor is configured to withhold at least one paragraph included in a body of the electronic message based on a subject matter extracted from textual content of the at least one paragraph. 18. The computing system of claim 10, wherein the processor is configured to withhold at least one attached computer file that is attached to the electronic message based on a subject matter extracted from textual content included in the attached computer file. 19. A non-transitory computer readable medium storing instructions that when executed by a processor causes the processor to perform a method comprising: receiving an electronic message from a user device, the electronic message comprising content and at least one message recipient; withholding a portion of the content of the electronic message for a message recipient based on a subject matter of the content portion and transmitting a remaining content portion of the electronic message to the message recipient; receiving information about a subsequent activity of the message recipient from a message recipient device; and transmitting withheld content to the message recipient based on the received information about the subsequent activity of the message recipient. 20. The non-transitory computer readable medium of claim 19, wherein the subsequent activity information comprises at least one of data viewed via a web browsing client of the message recipient device and data from a communication session between the message recipient device and another user device via at least one of an email client, a messaging client, and a voice service.
